title: argemone pleiacantha
intro: Argemone pleiacantha, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Argemone pleiacantha include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and it may also have antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Argemone pleiacantha can be made into teas, ointments, or tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation.
